entries.text: The King personally visits the deepest trenches once each year.
A dragon sleeps beneath Atlantis.
Scholar's Deep sealed an entire archive wing fifty years ago.
Tidewardens regularly disappear during deep trench patrols.
The Azure Sentinels are preparing for war with Atlantis.
The Deep Gate is older than Atlantis itself.
Someone stole records from Scholar's Deep last year.
Commander Vaeloria once defeated a leviathan.
There is a secret prison somewhere beneath the city.
The royal family descends from ancient sea spirits.
An ancient sky city still survives somewhere above the clouds.
Deepborn tribes worship something sleeping beneath the ocean.
The Spiral symbol has appeared throughout Atlantis for decades.
Entire sections of Atlantis are missing from official maps.
A Tidewarden captain vanished while exploring ancient ruins.
The Merchant Consortium secretly funds pirates.
Scholar's Deep possesses artifacts recovered from another age.
The Drowned Ward never existed.
Nella Tidehopper wasn't the first child to disappear.
Something beneath Atlantis is slowly waking up.
A school group tours the district under the supervision of a tired Tidewarden.
A giant sea turtle slowly blocks traffic while citizens patiently wait.
A merchant loudly accuses another vendor of selling counterfeit goods.
Two children dare each other to enter an abandoned alleyway.
A group of musicians performs in the plaza, drawing a large crowd.
A Tidewarden patrol questions a suspicious traveler.
A wealthy noble's escort causes temporary street congestion.
A runaway reef ray mount races through the streets.
A courier drops an important package and desperately searches for it.
A fisherman claims he saw a monster in the lower canals.
A local vendor offers free samples of a new recipe.
A street preacher warns of coming disaster.
A group of recruits from another academy class challenge the party to a friendly competition.
A citizen recognizes one of the recruits and thanks them for their service.
A shop owner reports a recent theft.
A crowd gathers around a public announcement board.
A crowd gathers around a public announcement board.
A minor accident damages part of a coral walkway.
A lost child asks for help finding their parents.
The party notices someone watching them before disappearing into the crowd.
A pod of dolphins follows the party for several miles.
A giant sea turtle migrates through the area.
A merchant convoy requests an escort.
A damaged vessel drifts without crew.
Reef sharks investigate the party.
A friendly Deepborn scavenger offers information.
Strange lights appear in the distance.
The remains of an ancient ruin emerge from the seafloor.
A strong current pushes the party off course.
A whale shark larger than any previously seen swims past.
A Tidewarden patrol requests assistance.
A distress beacon activates nearby.
A rival adventuring group explores the same region.
A school of bioluminescent fish creates a dazzling display.
A trench opening not marked on any map is discovered.
Signs of recent pirate activity are found.
A storm from the Surface Realm affects underwater visibility.
The party discovers an abandoned campsite.
An injured sea creature requires assistance.
A distant shadow larger than a ship moves beneath the darkness.
Total darkness forces navigation by touch and instinct.
Ancient ruins emerge from the trench walls.
Strange whispers seem to travel through the water.
A Deepborn hunting party crosses the area.
A trench predator stalks the party from a distance.
An enormous skeleton rests partially buried in sediment.
A cave system descends deeper than expected.
Unnatural spiral symbols appear on nearby stone.
A damaged Tidewarden outpost is discovered.
The remains of a long-lost expedition are found.
A powerful current threatens to separate the party.
Bioluminescent forests illuminate the darkness.
A Deepborn elder offers cryptic warnings.
The party discovers evidence of illegal salvage operations.
A massive abyssal creature passes overhead.
Strange magical energy interferes with spells.
The party finds an unexplored trench branch.
Signs of Project Tidefall activity are discovered.
A hidden entrance to forgotten ruins appears.
Something enormous opens a single eye in the darkness before disappearing.
A training exercise goes unexpectedly wrong.
Squad Nine challenges the recruits to a competition.
Captain Thalorin observes training personally.
Commander Vaeloria delivers an impromptu inspection.
A recruit is caught breaking curfew.
A rumor spreads through the barracks.
A sparring tournament is announced.
A recruit requests help studying.
Equipment goes missing from storage.
An instructor tells stories from previous campaigns.
The kitchen staff requests volunteers.
A recruit receives disappointing news from home.
A Tidewarden veteran visits the academy.
A training beast escapes containment.
A surprise endurance challenge is announced.
An academy record is discovered in the wrong place.
A group of younger recruits seeks advice.
An instructor asks for assistance with a special project.
A memorial service is held for fallen Tidewardens.
The party notices a spiral symbol carved where it should not be.
A cooking competition is underway.
A musician challenges someone to perform.
A storyteller recounts a famous Atlantean legend.
A merchant offers a rare item at a suspiciously low price.
Children play games throughout the district.
A reef ray race attracts a large audience.
A noble offers a reward for winning a contest.
Fire coral lanterns are released into the water.
A fortune teller predicts disaster.
A drinking contest begins.
A traveling merchant arrives from the Surface Realm.
A local artist offers portraits.
An argument erupts between rival merchants.
A citizen asks the party for help.
A performer accidentally causes chaos.
A group of recruits celebrate graduation.
A prize creature escapes its enclosure.
Rumors spread of strange activity beneath the city.
Someone quietly slips a note into a recruit's pocket.
A distant alarm interrupts the festivities.
